blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,083 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
